site.title: Stéphane Konan — Mobile & Web Developer
site.description: Developer based in Abidjan, Ivory Coast. Specialized in interface design and high-performance web and mobile applications development.

hero.name: Stéphane Konan
hero.summary: Fullstack developer focused on clean architecture. I build high-performance, scalable applications using Laravel, Go, and Flutter, with a strong emphasis on real-world business systems (delivery, e-commerce, management, payments, multi-actor platforms).

summary: Complete design and development of Wadibu applications: customer app, delivery app, restaurant app (admin).
Implementation and deployment of the showcase website and backend API, ensuring consistency and performance across the ecosystem.
Architecture, integration and optimization of key features, guaranteeing a robust technical base ready for future store publication.
Development of a complete management application and a car wash application, with Laravel backend and Flutter frontend.
Deployment on APK Pure, with architecture and code ready for future release on official stores.
Integration of modern tools (Figma, Illustrator) for creating attractive interfaces and communicating technical concepts.
Design and development of a management application with Laravel, integrating advanced features to optimize productivity.
Creation of visual materials (Illustrator) and video editing for marketing and internal communication.
Creation and maintenance of the company showcase website and an e-commerce site with Angular and WordPress.
Production of advertising posters (Illustrator, Photoshop) and promotional videos to strengthen brand awareness.
Management of the Facebook page (community management) and community engagement.
Management of delivery drivers' phone fleet and operational support.
Maintenance and improvement of the internal web application with Vue.js.

about.title: About Me
about.description:
I am a web and mobile developer focused on clean architecture.
I design high-performance applications and platforms with an approach centered on scalability, security, and maintainability.
My goal is to build useful, well-structured solutions tailored to real business needs, combining product vision with technical rigor.
